---
title: "report_overview"
output:
  html_document:
    code_folding: show
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: true
    theme: flatly
    highlight: tango
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
  chunk_output_highlight: default
---

# Overview report: Flu Scenario Modelling

## Relevant background information
- [Model meta-data link]
- [Model documentation link]

```{r for_summary}
# 

```

### Summary
The Model was run successfully for X countries, 


### Detail section 1

```{r }
# 

```

### Detail section 2

```{r }
# 

```
